prompt: A photorealistic surreal landscape. A giant, perfectly smooth, reflective emerald green sphere rests on a cracked desert floor. A large section of the sphere's smooth surface is broken away, revealing that its interior is composed entirely of jagged, chaotic, glowing red-hot and dark grey rocky shards. The contrast between the flawless, unbroken exterior and the violent, fragmented interior is stark. Cinematic lighting, hyper-detailed, 8k resolution. --ar 16:9 --v 6.1
visual_logic: A flawlessly smooth, unbroken sphere is revealed to be composed entirely of jagged, chaotic shards. This maps the Ecological Fallacy: the macro-level property (smoothness) is completely contradicted by, and absent in, every individual micro-level member.
